title: Home+ Plastic Waste Paper Bin Basket 6L Waste Rubbish Trash Can Round Kitchen Bathroom Bedroom Office Garbage Dustbin, 6 Litre (Pink)
features: A round waste bin to easily keep any room clutter & litter free. Available in 3 different colours, is this basket style bin is made from sturdy hard-wearing plastic in step style structure and matte finish pastel colours to provide you a practical waste management solution at home or in the office, especially for paper.

This round plastic waste bin is available in 3 DIFFERENT COLOURS – Grey, Pink and White. The MAXIMUM CAPACITY of EACH BIN is 6 Litres. Dimensions OF each bin are – Height: 24cm and Diameter: 24cm. NOTE – ONLY 1 BIN IN YOUR CHOSEN COLOUR SHALL BE SENT OUT.

PAPER WASTE BIN/BASKET – A matte finish open waste bin designed to be a quick waste management solution. It comes completely open for you to place rubbish or paper straight in without the hassle of lids. You can use it with or without a bin liner and as it is lightweight you can effortlessly lift, carry and empty, making it very easy to use and handy to have indoors or outdoors.

SPACE EFFICIENT WASTE BIN FOR CLUTTER FREE SPACE – This waste bin is specially designed to take minimal space as possible and hold greater capacity of rubbish to keep any area or room organised. It is built in a round shape with a narrow base and flared structure to perfectly fit into corners and small spaces such as under desks or by the cupboard so you can place in rubbish without any strain.

A WASTE BIN CRAFTED TO SUIT YOUR NEED - Keep rooms around the home or office clean and tidy with this plastic waste bin/basket. No matter if you want a bin desired to your room colour scheme or something modern, this bin will never go unseen by you, other or even children. Suitable to use around the office, bedroom, bathroom, study room, kitchen & more.
